title: Architecting for Scale: Lessons from the Trenches
description: Explore strategies for building systems that grow alongside your user base without compromising performance or reliability. Sarah and Alex share their experience scaling high-traffic platforms to millions of users.

title: The Future of WebAssembly in the Browser
description: WebAssembly is revolutionizing the web platform by enabling near-native performance for performance-critical applications. This talk covers current advancements and what to expect in the next decade of browser technology.

title: AI-Driven Development: Productivity or Pitfall?
description: Generative AI is changing how we write and deploy code. Marcus examines whether AI-assisted tools truly enhance developer productivity or if they introduce more complexity than they solve.

title: Securing Your Modern Cloud Stack
description: In an era of serverless and containers, traditional security models are failing. Learn how to implement a Zero Trust architecture and secure your modern cloud-native stack from end to end.

title: Deep Dive into Node.js Event Loop Internals
description: Unlock the true potential of Node.js by understanding the V8 engine and the libuv event loop. Kenji and Maria walk through how Node handles asynchronous I/O and how to optimize for massive throughput.

title: Building Accessible & Inclusive UX
description: Accessibility is not a feature; it's a fundamental human right. Chloe demonstrates how to build inclusive user experiences that work for everyone, regardless of their physical or cognitive abilities.
